figures.caption: Figure 1: (Color online) The optimized crystal structures of V X2 and V2X2 (X = S, Se) are shown. (a) and (b) are the top and side views of pristine V X2. (c) and (d) are the top and side views of reconstructed monoclinic V2X2, stabilized by a chalcogen-cluster vacancy. Shaded region denotes the unit cell with lattice vectors shown as arrows.
Figure 2: (Color online) Phonon dispersion are shown for (a) V2S2 and (b) V2Se2 structures.The Brillouin zone with the highsymmetry path used for phonon calculations is shown as inset.

Figure 4: (Color online) Spin-polarized electronic band structures of (a) V2S2 and (c) V2Se2 are shown. (b) and (d) represent the projected density of states (PDOS) of V2S2 and V2Se2, respectively. Solid (red) and dashed (blue) lines denote the spin up and spin-down bands, respectively. The band structures are calculated along the high-symmetry path Γ–X–M–Y –Γ, and show pronounced momentum-dependent spin splitting near the X and Y points.
